title: Fire Safety Regulations
scenario: Write a set of fire safety regulations for a school with 500 students. The regulations should cover topics such as emergency exit procedures, fire alarms, and fire extinguisher usage. The regulations should be written in a format suitable for students to follow and understand.
constraints: Must be written in a format suitable for students aged 13-18
Must include diagrams of fire extinguisher usage

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated regulations adhere to the given constraints (student-friendly format, diagrams, word count).
The regulations are clear and easy to understand for the target audience (students aged 13-18).
The regulations include accurate and up-to-date fire safety information.
